<button onclick="
    if (history.length > 1) {
        history.back();
    } else {
        window.location.href = '/portfolio.html';
    }
"
style="
    display:inline-block;
    padding:6px 12px;
    border:1px solid #aaa;
    border-radius:4px;
    background:#e9ecef;
    cursor:pointer;
    color:#333;
    font-weight:500;
">&lt; Return to portfolio</button>
